items.question: What is the Global Tipping Points Conference 2026?
items.answer: The Global Tipping Points Conference 2026 brings together scientists, policymakers, media professionals, and practitioners to explore critical climate tipping points and accelerate action toward planetary health solutions.

items.question: Where and when will the conference take place?
items.answer: Sunway University, Malaysia. 12–15 October 2026.

items.question: Who should attend this conference?
items.answer: Scientists, policymakers, business leaders, civil society, Indigenous Peoples, artists, and youth who have an interest in planetary health solutions.

items.question: How do I get to the venue?
items.answer: The conference will be held at Sunway University, about 45–60 minutes from Kuala Lumpur International Airport (KLIA) by car, and is easily accessible via Grab and taxi. By public transport, take the Light Rail Transport (LRT) Kelana Jaya Line to USJ 7 Station, switch to the Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) Sunway Line, and alight at SunU–Monash Station, followed by a short walk to campus.

items.question: Will there be Wi-Fi at the venue?
items.answer: Complimentary Wi-Fi is available at the venue. Login credentials will be provided on the day of the conference.

items.question: Where can I get the latest information about Global Tipping Points?
items.answer: To learn more about Global Tipping Points, visit global-tipping-points.org.

items.question: How do I register?
items.answer: Registration can be completed directly on the website: https://www.sunwayplanetaryhealth.com.my/events/gtp-2026/register. Early bird rates will be available for a limited time—stay tuned.

items.question: How much does it cost to attend the conference?
items.answer: Registration fees vary by participant category (e.g. early bird, standard, student, or partner rates). Detailed pricing will be available on the official registration page.

items.question: Are there early bird or discounted rates available?
items.answer: Yes. Early bird rates will be offered for a limited time until 31 July 2026. Discounts may also be available for students, group registrations, or partners.

items.question: What does the registration fee include?
items.answer: For in-person participants, registration includes access to all conference sessions, poster and exhibition areas, and a conference kit (name tag and programme booklet). Meals during the conference are also covered, including two coffee breaks and lunch.

items.question: Are there any scholarships or financial support options?
items.answer: To enquire about scholarships and financial support, please get in touch via https://www.sunwayplanetaryhealth.com.my/events/gtp-2026/get-involved#contact

items.question: Can I participate virtually?
items.answer: Yes. Detailed pricing will be available on the official registration page.

items.question: Will the conference be held in-person or hybrid?
items.answer: Hybrid.

items.question: Does the conference provide certificates of participation?
items.answer: Yes. A participation certificate will be given at the end of the conference.

items.question: Can I register on behalf of someone else?
items.answer: Yes. You may register on behalf of another participant; ensure their details are entered accurately at registration.

items.question: Is accommodation included in the registration fee?
items.answer: Accommodation is not included in the registration fee, but recommended hotels and special rates may be provided.

items.question: How can I cancel my registration, and am I eligible for a refund?
items.answer: Cancellation and refund terms will be published on the official registration page. For specific cases, contact the conference team via the Get involved page.

items.question: Who can I contact for more information?
items.answer: For further enquiries, please contact scph_gtpc2026@sunway.edu.my

items.question: Can I submit an abstract to present at the conference?
items.answer: Yes. Participants are encouraged to submit abstracts for consideration as part of the conference programme.

items.question: What topics are eligible for abstract submission?
items.answer: Eligible themes include: Earth system science; Technology and AI; Governance; Finance and Business; Faith and Culture; Communications; Nature-Based Solutions; and Health.

items.question: What is the deadline for abstract submission?
items.answer: Deadlines will be confirmed on the Submissions page. Please check https://www.sunwayplanetaryhealth.com.my/events/gtp-2026/submissions for the latest dates.

items.question: How do I submit an abstract?
items.answer: Abstracts must be submitted through the official submission link on the conference website: https://www.sunwayplanetaryhealth.com.my/events/gtp-2026/submissions

items.question: What is the selection process for abstracts?
items.answer: All submissions will be reviewed by the programme committee based on relevance, originality, and impact.

items.question: When will I be notified of the outcome?
items.answer: Applicants will be notified via email by 15 June 2026.

items.question: Is conference registration required if my abstract is accepted?
items.answer: Yes. Registration and payment of the applicable fee are required after acceptance notification is received.

items.question: What are Action Workshops?
items.answer: Action Workshops are interactive sessions focused on practical solutions, collaboration, and implementation strategies related to tipping points and climate action.

items.question: Can I propose an Action Workshop?
items.answer: Yes. Individuals and organisations are invited to submit proposals for Action Workshops.

items.question: What should be included in an Action Workshop proposal?
items.answer: Proposals should clearly outline the workshop objectives, format, expected outcomes, target audience, and facilitator(s). Refer to the Action Workshop proposal submission page for full requirements: https://www.sunwayplanetaryhealth.com.my/events/gtp-2026/submissions

items.question: What is the deadline for Action Workshop submissions?
items.answer: Deadlines will be confirmed on the Submissions page. Please check https://www.sunwayplanetaryhealth.com.my/events/gtp-2026/submissions for the latest dates.

items.question: How are Action Workshop proposals evaluated?
items.answer: Proposals will be assessed based on relevance, interactivity, feasibility, and potential for real-world impact.

items.question: Will workshop facilitators need to register for the conference?
items.answer: Yes. All selected workshop facilitators are required to register.
